paper_title: RH+: Row-Hit-Optimized Scheduling for PIM-based LLM Inference
description: Identifies DRAM row cycle time (nRC) as the dominant bottleneck for PIM-based LLM inference, overshadowing previously targeted power constraint (nCCDAB). Proposes RH+ scheduling that changes the MAC address stride to keep 32 consecutive operations within the same row, converting row misses into hits. Cycle-accurate simulation across four LLMs demonstrates 8.25–11.88× speedup, 74.5–77.1% energy reduction, and 32.4–52.0× EDP improvement.
